title: phyllostegia imminuta
intro: Phyllostegia imminuta, also known as the 'Narrowleaf Phyllostegia' or 'Oahu Tree Hyssop', is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to Hawaii. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllostegia imminuta include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to soothe digestive problems like diarrhea and nausea. Herbal preparations of Phyllostegia imminuta may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
